title: Toy Defenders
description: Do you ever considered to get better base protection? Are you too lazy to kill mobs? Do you ever wished that someone would collect items and exp for you?
body:
Do you ever considered to get better base protection? Are you too lazy to kill mobs? Do you ever wished that someone would collect items and exp for you?

 

Well Don’t worry this mod will definetly help by adding 10 different living toys with unique fightning styles and purposes as well.


# **Current Living Toys:**

Snow Yeti:
minecraft toy defenders mod
Has 10 health and 0 armor points.
Has 15 color variations(Dyable).
Will fight melee and leap at enemies.
Deals 3 damage per hit.
This toy is first and most basic toy.
Can be crafted.


Mr Bomby:

Has 10 health and 0 armor points.
Basically is toy version of a creeper.
Has 15 color variations(Dyable).
Has explosion radius same as base creeper.
Fire will cause him to self destruct.
Can be crafted.


Arrow Tower:

Has 20 health and 5 armor points.
Has 15 color variations(Dyable).
Has medium range of shooting.
Has immunity to fire and poison.
Will constantly shoot arrows at enemies.
Will shoot arrows at medium speed.
Arrows will deal 4-5 damage per hit.
Can be crafted.


Space Ship:

Has 20 health and 10 armor points.
Has 15 color variations(Dyable).
Has immunity to fire and poison, fall damage, knockback.
Has abillity to fly and will always fly towards enemies.
Will fight melee and deal 7 damage per hit.
Can be crafted.


Gunner:

Has 20 health and 0 armor points.
Has 15 color variations(Dyable).
Has low range of shooting.
Will shoot bullets that will deal 5-6 damage per hit.
Will shoot at medium speed.
Can be crafted.


Tiny Tank:

Has 40 health and 20 armor points.
Has immunity to knockback.
Has 15 color variations(Dyable).
Has long range of shooting.
Will shoot out small tnt missiles at enemies.
Every missle will cause same explosion as if TNT would be detonated(will not grief blocks).
Has slow speed of shooting missles.
Don't underdestemate this beast as it can easily kill hordes of zombies with 1-2 missles.
Can be crafted.


Air Balloon:

Has 20 health and 0 armor points.
Will not fight back as will be only used as a support in battles.
Has 15 color variations(Dyable).
Will push all items and experience towards it(So any player could collect them).
Will follow player around..
Has immunity to knockback.
Can be crafted.


Dummy:

Has 20 health and 20 armor points.
Has 15 color variations(Dyable).
Has knockback resistance and will not attack any mob.
Every 10 seconds will make hostile mobs in 20 block radius attack him(Works like mob magnet).
Can be crafted.


Explosive Dummy:

Has 20 health and 20 armor points.
Has knockback resistance and will not attack any mob.
Every 10 seconds will make hostile mobs in 20 block radius attack him(Works like mob magnet).
Will cause tnt explosion on death.
Can be crafted.


Teddy Bear:

Has 20 health and 0 armor points.
Has 14 color variations(Only cosmetic difference).
Can be equipped with fire immunity armor by right clicking it with blaze powder.
Can equip vanilla minecraft swords, bow, shield and even flint and steel.
While wearing shield will absorb any damage taken from mobs or any living being.
While using weapons, bow, shield over time these items can break like this happens with player.
Base damage is 6 and it increases depending on equiped sword .
Will fight both melee and ranged depending on weapon.
With diamond sword and shield can take on large hordes of enderman or zombie pigman with ease.
Every colored teddy bear can be crafted by using corresponding wool block instead of default one.
Can be crafted.


 
Mod Copyright for mod packs/distribution: [https://www.rolikdevelopment.com/mod-copyright/]
 

Note: Every toy will attack any mob that is enemy of player and will not attack golem type mobs, ghasts.

Every time you spawn a toy it will be fully attached to only one player and will kill all players enemies and fight other player toys as well.

Also be sure to suggest your own toy and their abilities!
